description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe featuring a combination of materials and colors, including a textured beige sole, mesh-like brown panels, and a prominent magenta side stripe. The upper part of the shoe is primarily purple with a soft, padded tongue in a lighter lavender shade, and it is secured with black laces in a standard criss-cross pattern. The shoe has a rounded toe box and a reinforced heel counter, both in beige, providing structure and durability. The midsole appears cushioned for comfort, while the side panels are designed for breathability and style. The interior is lined in white, suggesting a comfortable fit for urban walking or casual wear. No visible logos or brand markings are present, and the shoe appears to be in pristine, new condition.
description: A stylish, multi-colored athletic shoe with a beige sole, purple and brown mesh upper, magenta side stripe, and black criss-cross laces. The shoe looks new and is designed for comfort and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded beige toe, black laces, and lavender tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the magenta side stripe, brown mesh panels, and beige sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the reinforced beige heel and lavender tongue top.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the magenta stripe and mesh details.
